allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{r[\\"name\\"]} #{r[\\"run_number\\"]} - {r[\\"status\\"]} - {r[\\"conclusion\\"]} - {r[\\"head_commit\\"][\\"message\\"][:50]}'\) for r in data.get\('workflow_runs',[]\)]")

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const pkgDeps = Object.keys\({...pkg.dependencies, ...pkg.devDependencies}\); const lockDeps = Object.keys\(lock.packages || lock.dependencies || {}\); console.log\('package.json deps:', pkgDeps.length\); console.log\('package-lock entries:', lockDeps.length\); const missing = pkgDeps.filter\(d => !lockDeps.some\(l => l === d || l === 'node_modules/'+d || l.endsWith\('/'+d\)\)\); if\(missing.length\) console.log\('Missing from lock:', missing\); else console.log\('All deps in lock file'\);")

Bash(node -e "const lock = require\('./package-lock.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(lock.packages || {}\); const hasTauri = keys.some\(k => k.includes\('tauri-apps/cli'\)\); console.log\('Tauri CLI in lock:', hasTauri\);")
